sections.title: Standard dialogue after Sins of the Father
If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: You! You're the one that lost me my tithes. Get out before I have you killed!

sections.title: If the player is disguised and has not yet helped Desmodus Lasiurus with his slaves during Sins of the Father

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: Tell me, [player vampyre name], what blood tastes the best?

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: You misunderstand me, I mean what kind of human?

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: What? I mean, yes. But what else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know... What's the actual answer?

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: Love. Blood tastes best when it comes from one who loves.

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: Too many around here treat their tithes with discontentment. When they do, they miss out on the full potential blood has to offer.

lines.speaker: Lord Alexei Jovkai
lines.text: Treat your tithes with respect instead. They will come to love you, and their blood becomes so much better as a result.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I'll keep that in mind.
